goals.goal: Reach 750 students through AI and cybersecurity education
Partner with 11 schools and community organizations
Develop 13 educational AI and cybersecurity resources

impactMetrics.label: People Reached
impactMetrics.description: People who participated in AI and cybersecurity workshops and outreach events.

impactMetrics.label: Workshops Conducted
impactMetrics.description: Interactive AI and cybersecurity workshops delivered in schools and community settings.

impactMetrics.label: Partner Organizations
